inputs.name: subscription_resource
inputs.label: Workflow Subscription Resource
inputs.description:
A Subscription resource in JSON format that Inferno will send to the server under test
              so that it can demonstrate its ability to perform the Subscription creation and Notification
              response workflow. The instance must be conformant to the R4/B Topic-Based Subscription profile.
              Inferno may modify the Subscription before submission, e.g., to point to Inferno's notification endpoint.
              This input is also used by the unsupported Subscription test as the base on which to add unsupported
              element values to test for server rejection.

inputs.name: access_token
inputs.label: Notification Access Token
inputs.description:
An access token that the server under test will send to Inferno on notifications
              so that the request gets associated with this test session. The token must be
              provided as a `Bearer` token in the `Authorization` header of HTTP requests
              sent to Inferno.

inputs.name: url
inputs.label: FHIR Server Base URL
inputs.description:
FHIR base URL for the server under test where Inferno will send
                            Subscription Creation, $status, and other requests as a part of
                            these tests.

inputs.name: smart_auth_info
inputs.label: OAuth Credentials
inputs.description: Credentials for Inferno to include when making requests against the server under test.

inputs.name: subscription_resource
inputs.label: Workflow Subscription Resource
inputs.description:
A Subscription resource in JSON format that Inferno will send to the server under test
              so that it can demonstrate its ability to perform the Subscription creation and Notification
              response workflow. The instance must be conformant to the R4/B Topic-Based Subscription profile.
              Inferno may modify the Subscription before submission, e.g., to point to Inferno's notification endpoint.
              This input is also used by the unsupported Subscription test as the base on which to add unsupported

inputs.name: unsupported_subscription_topic
inputs.label: Unsupported Subscription Topic
inputs.description:
A Subscription Topic for the `criteria` element that is not implemented by the server to test
                           for Subscription rejection.

inputs.name: unsupported_subscription_filter
inputs.label: Unsupported Subscription Filter
inputs.description:
A value for `filterCriteria` extension under the `criteria` that is not implemented by the
                           server to test for Subscription rejection.

inputs.name: unsupported_subscription_channel_type
inputs.label: Unsupported Subscription Channel Type
inputs.description:
A value for the `channel.type` element that is not implemented by the server to test for
                           Subscription rejection.

inputs.name: unsupported_subscription_channel_endpoint
inputs.label: Unsupported Subscription Channel Endpoint
inputs.description: An unsupported value for the `channel.endpoint` element to test for Subscription rejection.

inputs.name: unsupported_subscription_payload_type
inputs.label: Unsupported Subscription Payload Type
inputs.description:
A value for the `content` extension under the `channel.payload` element that is not
                           implemented by the server to test for Subscription rejection.

inputs.name: unsupported_subscription_channel_payload_combo
inputs.label: Unsupported Subscription Channel and Payload Combination
inputs.description:
A channel (`channel.type`) and payload type (`content` extension under the `channel.payload` element)
              combination not implemented by the server to test for Subscription
              rejection. Provide as a JSON object with two keys as follows: {"channel": "channel_type",
              "payload": "wrong_payload_type_for_this_channel"}.
